## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles without errors (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] New features have corresponding tests
- [ ] Environment variables documented in `.env.example` if added
